cast.flaw: Immersed in their own world, perhaps unaware of the transient beauty they are part of.
cast.motivation: Simply moving through the city, perhaps lost in thought, driven by an unspoken destination.
cast.name: The Cyclist
cast.profile: A solitary figure, anonymously passing through the night, their presence a quiet counterpoint to the rain.

locations.description: An old-world street paved with wet, glistening cobblestones, reflecting the light of an antique lamppost.
locations.name: Cobblestone Street

content.logline: A lone cyclist navigates rain-slicked cobblestones, momentarily illuminated by a single warm streetlight, creating a fleeting tableau of quiet solitude.

scene_outline.conflict: The ephemeral nature of the moment; the cyclist is a transient figure in the rain-soaked stillness.
scene_outline.goal: To capture a fleeting, atmospheric moment of quiet urban beauty and solitude.
scene_outline.turn: The cyclist glides from shadow into the warm, inviting pool of light, then continues into the darkness beyond.

story_arc.conflict: The subtle interplay between the natural elements (rain) and the artificial light, framing a fleeting human presence.
story_arc.summary: A solitary moment of a cyclist passing under a streetlight in the rain, focusing on atmosphere and the transient beauty of the scene.
story_arc.turning_point: The brief, perfect illumination of the cyclist as they pass directly under the lamppost's glow.
